name: Kheer Bhawani Temple
description: A highly sacred and prominent Hindu temple constructed over a holy spring. It is dedicated to Goddess Ragnya Devi, deeply revered by Kashmiri Pandits.
history: It is believed that the color of the spring's water changes miraculously, turning black to indicate impending disasters for the valley.
famousFor: Sacred spring, annual Mela, spiritual significance.
bestTime: May to June (During the annual Mela)
